message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
title Shared memory receiver behaviour

participant "Shared memory receiver" as Receiver
package "Coordination struct" {
    participant "Reader count var" as ReaderCount
    participant "locks_active" as LocksActive
    participant "locks_leaving" as LocksLeaving
    participant "Semaphore copy" as SemCopy
}
participant "Copy buff" as CopyBuff

rectangle create {
    alt "Coordination semaphore doesn't exist"
        Receiver -> SemCopy: Create semaphore
    end
    
    Receiver -> Receiver: wait
    note right of Receiver: Writer sets up sharedmemory
    Receiver <- CopyBuff: Writer is ready
    note right of CopyBuff: Writer inits it with the required number
    
    Receiver -> Receiver: ok
    Receiver -> ReaderCount: reincrease
    note right of ReaderCount: this way all readers access the memory,\nthey will fail on the copy sem
    
    Receiver -> Receiver: MMap coordination struct
    Receiver -> SemCopy: Trylock copy semaphore
    
    alt
        :Fail;
        note right of Receiver: Can't lock
    else
        :Success;
        Receiver -> Receiver: MMap copy buffer
        Receiver -> Receiver: read_flag to true
        Receiver -> LocksLeaving: Lock leaving[1]
        Receiver -> ReaderCount: Signal reader ready
    end
    
    Receiver -> Receiver: Close coordination semaphore file
    Receiver -> Receiver: Success
}

rectangle ready {
    Receiver -> Receiver: ready?
    
    alt [finished flag set]
        :False;
        note left of Receiver: [has read current chunk]
        Receiver -> LocksActive: lock next chunk (reading)
        note right of LocksActive: Blocks until next\nchunk is written
        Receiver -> Receiver: Release previous leaving
        Receiver -> Receiver: Change active
        Receiver -> Receiver: reset read flag
        Receiver -> Receiver: get chunk size
        Receiver -> CopyBuff: c_size
        Receiver -> Receiver: c_size > 0
        note left of Receiver: [Yet to read current and no finished flag]
        :True;
        
        alt [finished]
            note left of Receiver: This is done before\nactually returning
            Receiver -> Receiver: Set finished flag
            Receiver -> Receiver: Release lock
        end
    end
    
    rectangle buff_size {
        Receiver -> ReaderCount: get buff_size from coord
        Receiver -> Receiver: buff_size
    }
}

rectangle receive {
    note right of Receiver: This is called after ready so I am already on the correct\nchunk and it has data to read
    
    alt [read_flag_set or finished flag set]
        :Fail;
        Receiver -> CopyBuff: Read data in current chunk
        Receiver -> Receiver: vector
        Receiver -> Receiver: set read flag
        Receiver -> LocksLeaving: lock leaving
        Receiver -> LocksActive: release active
        Receiver -> Receiver: vector
    end
}

rectangle destructor {
    Receiver -> Receiver: Destroy
    
    alt [not finished]
        alt [read_flag set]
            Receiver -> LocksActive: unlock
        else [read_flag false]
            Receiver -> LocksLeaving: unlock
        end
        
        Receiver -> ReaderCount: Notify left
        Receiver -> Receiver: Unmap memory
        Receiver -> Receiver: Close files
    end
}

@enduml
```
